env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Custom base URL for Anthropic API

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_BETAS
env_vars.description: Beta feature headers for API requests

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL_AWS_REGION
env_vars.description: AWS region for small fast model

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_API_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Base URL for Claude Code API

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_FILE_DESCRIPTOR
env_vars.description: File descriptor for API key (instead of env var)

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DEBUG_LOG_LEVEL
env_vars.description: Debug log level (debug, info, warn, error)

env_vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL
env_vars.description: Shell to use for bash tool

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
env_vars.description: Path to Google Cloud credentials JSON
